articles.title: The US, Canada and Mexico begin bumpy negotiations to renew North American trade pact - AP News
articles.description: The North American trade pact that President Donald Trump negotiated and boasted about in his first term is up for renewal. It’s a process that is likely to last months, maybe longer. And the path forward is lined with landmines. The U.S. is making demands th…
